narrative: PRL gave back yesterday's bounce and then some: volume-weighted price slid to $0.7329 (-13.66% 24h) on just $90.1k of cross-venue volume — a 58% drop in turnover and one fewer live pair as the smallest v4/ETH pool went dark. Bridge plumbing stayed steady through the drawdown — custody +0.6% to 476,918 PRL, minted WPRL +0.2% to 473,555, and supply/custody snapped back into perfect agreement (yesterday's 1.4k PRL in-flight gap cleared). The chain itself looked healthy: hashrate +10.6% to 26.95 EH/s, pool GPU count 35 → 40, block cadence ~130s. Code velocity continued at a steady clip with PearlBridge's repos rolling RC5.35, and the pearl-research-labs core picked up another 5 stars to 164.

market.prl_circulating_supply_method: block_height × current_block_reward (constant-subsidy approximation — Pearl is in month 1, before the first halving)
sources: pool.mineprl.com/v1/public/summary (network.height, network.block_reward_prl for circulating supply approximation)

network.active_workers_scope: MinePRL pool only — network-wide miner count is not exposed by Pearl RPC

anomalies: PRL price -13.66% in 24h ($0.8548 → $0.7329) on $90.1k volume — yesterday's +8.4% bounce fully retraced and then some, on 58% less turnover.
Cross-venue pair count dropped 7 → 6: dust Uniswap V4 WPRL/ETH pool (0xdb52…) fell off DEXScreener — no volume in 24h.
Bridge supply/custody re-aligned (delta 0 PRL) — yesterday's 1,386 PRL gap between /api/supply and totalSupplyGrains cleared as the in-flight mint settled.
Network hashrate +10.6% to 26.95 EH/s and pool GPUs 35 → 40 — capacity adding back, no sign of miner stress from the price drop.

social.summary: No coordinated criticism around the drawdown — @prlnet and @pearlbridgexyz feeds stayed quiet through the move and there's no incident chatter. Conversation volume around $PRL still light overall.

github.last_commit_msg: RC5.35: Rabby first; drop named MetaMask entry to kill blank-screen bug
docs: tidy mirror references and audit attributions
fix(rpc): use chain.IsCurrent for getblocktemplate IBD check (#125)
